purpose: Provenance metadata for entropy-rate values imported into TME symbolic-scale calculations.
tme_scope: TME uses these values as input constants to compute symbolic rare-valid lift, L = log10(I + 1), and Lambda = log10(L + 1). TME does not recompute entropy rates from raw text.

entropy_rate_method.description: Nonparametric probabilistic-finite-state-automaton entropy-rate estimation after mapping text to a shared 27-symbol alphabet.

human_reference.source: Project Gutenberg long-form prose, analyzed in https://github.com/zeroknowledgediscovery/nero

gpt_reference.source: GPT-5 long-form prose generated and analyzed under the protocol in https://github.com/zeroknowledgediscovery/nero

imported_into_tme.note: These are central mean values used for the manuscript symbolic-scale calculation. Sensitivity to finite-length slack rho is handled separately in TME. The entropy-rate estimates should be traced to https://github.com/zeroknowledgediscovery/nero.
